pi_items.source: Task description line 5 states: 'Save the file to "C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\Safety_Certificate.docx"'
Task description line 5 explicitly states: 'Save the file to "C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\Safety_Certificate.docx"'
Task description line 5 states: "Create a 'Certificate of Completion'"
Task description line 5 states: "for 'James A. Smith'"

pi_items.verified_value: Industrial Workplace Safety (as substring of full course name)
pi_items.source: Task description line 5 states: "for the course 'Industrial Workplace Safety Level II'". The metadata specifies the substring 'Industrial Workplace Safety' which is present in the full course name specified in the task description.

Microsoft Office Open XML specification (officeopenxml.com/WPsection.php) confirms w:orient attribute is used within w:pgSz element to specify page orientation. 'landscape' is the valid value for landscape orientation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Vertical center alignment check via w:vAlign w:val='center'
pi_items.verified_value: w:vAlign w:val='center' is correct OOXML attribute for page-level vertical alignment
pi_items.source: Office Open XML specification and c-rex.net documentation confirm that <w:vAlign w:val='center'/> within <w:sectPr> specifies page-level vertical text alignment center. Verifier correctly checks for this pattern to verify task requirement.

pi_items.metadata_value: Double line page border check via w:pgBorders with w:val='double'
pi_items.verified_value: w:pgBorders with w:val='double' is correct OOXML structure for double line borders
pi_items.source: Office Open XML specification (officeopenxml.com/WPsectionBorders.php) documents that <w:pgBorders> contains child elements (w:top, w:left, w:bottom, w:right) with w:val attribute. The value 'double' specifies a double line style border.

pi_items.metadata_value: DOCX format with XML content validation
pi_items.source: Task description specifies saving to 'Safety_Certificate.docx' and verifier.py parses DOCX as ZIP with word/document.xml using zipfile module, confirming DOCX format compliance.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task description mentions 'Dark Blue' for page border color
pi_items.verified_value: Task says 'Dark Blue, Double Line, 3pt Page Border'
pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'Apply a Dark Blue, Double Line, 3pt Page Border to the document.' Verifier.py lines 106-113 check for non-'auto' color attributes but do not validate specific dark blue color hex code.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Certificate of Completion document for James A. Smith regarding the course Industrial Workplace Safety Level II. The document must be saved as Safety_Certificate.docx to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ in Landscape orientation with the text vertically centered using Page Setup Layout settings, a Dark Blue Double Line 3pt page border applied, and containing the exact text 'Certificate of Completion', 'James A. Smith', and 'Industrial Workplace Safety'. The OOXML XML patterns used by the verifier to validate landscape orientation (w:orient='landscape'), vertical center alignment (w:vAlign w:val='center'), and double line borders (w:pgBorders with w:val='double') are all correct per the Office Open XML specification. The required text values specified in metadata directly correspond to content described in the task description.
